meta.description: Synthetic corpus modelling the structure and challenges of the Enron Email Dataset (CMU/Kaggle) combined with GitHub Issues. Mirrors: identity aliasing, email quoting/forwarding, decision reversals, state transitions, redacted messages, and cross-posts. To use the real Enron corpus, replace this generator with the loader in src/enron_loader.py (documented separately).

emails.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
emails.body: Team, we need to decide on the database for NovexCore v2. I'm leaning toward PostgreSQL for its JSON support and strong ACID guarantees. Thoughts?

emails.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
emails.body: Agree on Postgres. We've used it in DataPipeline and it's been rock solid. MySQL is an option but Postgres has better window functions.

emails.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
emails.body: I've benchmarked both. PostgreSQL wins on complex queries by ~30%. My recommendation: PostgreSQL.

emails.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
emails.body: From a product angle, either works. I'll defer to engineering here.

emails.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
emails.body: Decision made: we go with PostgreSQL for NovexCore v2. David, please update the ADR.

emails.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
emails.body: Heads up: the cloud vendor deal gives us managed MySQL at 40% lower cost. Re-opening the DB decision.

emails.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
emails.body: After cost review, we are switching to MySQL. I know this reverses our earlier decision — documenting the reason: vendor discount + ops simplicity.

emails.subject: Database selection for NovexCore v2
emails.body: Understood. Will update migration scripts. Not ideal but makes sense economically.

emails.subject: Auth token expiry — security incident
emails.body: Found a bug: auth tokens never expire in AuthService. This is a security vulnerability. Assigning to Frank.

emails.subject: Auth token expiry — security incident
emails.body: Confirmed. Tokens issued before 2024-01-10 have no exp claim. Working on a fix now.

emails.subject: Auth token expiry — security incident
emails.body: I can force-rotate all tokens in prod as a hotfix. Risk: users get logged out. Worth it?

emails.subject: Auth token expiry — security incident
emails.body: Yes, force rotate. User disruption acceptable given security risk. Hector please proceed.

emails.subject: Auth token expiry — security incident
emails.body: Token rotation complete. 2,847 sessions invalidated. Monitoring for issues.

emails.subject: Auth token expiry — security incident
emails.body: Fix deployed: tokens now have 24h expiry. Added regression test. Closing.

emails.subject: Q1 roadmap sync
emails.body: Sharing Q1 roadmap draft. Key items: (1) NovexCore v2 launch, (2) ReportingEngine beta, (3) InfraV2 Kubernetes migration. Please review by Friday.

emails.subject: Q1 roadmap sync
emails.body: Engineering capacity looks tight. NovexCore v2 and Kubernetes migration in same quarter is risky. Can we push InfraV2 to Q2?

emails.subject: Q1 roadmap sync
emails.body: Agreed with Grace. InfraV2 moves to Q2. NovexCore v2 stays Q1. Carol, update the roadmap.

emails.subject: Q1 roadmap sync
emails.body: Updated. Q1: NovexCore v2 + ReportingEngine beta. Q2: InfraV2 migration.

emails.subject: Re: Re: Q1 roadmap sync
emails.body:
Forwarding Carol's roadmap update for the data team. Key: NovexCore v2 in Q1 means we need DataPipeline connectors ready by March 1.

--- Forwarded ---
Updated. Q1: NovexCore v2 + ReportingEngine beta. Q2: InfraV2 migration.

emails.subject: Kafka vs RabbitMQ for event streaming
emails.body: We need an event streaming solution for the analytics pipeline. Evaluating Kafka and RabbitMQ.

emails.subject: Kafka vs RabbitMQ for event streaming
emails.body: Kafka is the clear choice for high-throughput. We're talking millions of events/day. RabbitMQ would struggle.

emails.subject: Kafka vs RabbitMQ for event streaming
emails.body: Agreed on Kafka. I've set up a POC. Throughput: 850k msg/sec. Latency p99: 12ms. Very promising.

emails.subject: Kafka vs RabbitMQ for event streaming
emails.body: Decision: Kafka for event streaming in DataPipeline. James to lead implementation.

emails.subject: Hiring: Senior Backend Engineer
emails.body: Opening a Senior Backend Engineer role. Requirements: Go or Python, distributed systems experience, Kafka a plus. JD attached.

emails.subject: Hiring: Senior Backend Engineer
emails.body: Approved. Let's aim to have someone onboarded by Q2.

emails.subject: Hiring: Senior Backend Engineer
emails.body: Update: 3 strong candidates. Moving to final interviews.

emails.subject: Hiring: Senior Backend Engineer
emails.body: Offer extended to Candidate A. Joining April 1.

emails.subject: On-call rotation changes
emails.body: Proposing new on-call rotation: 1-week shifts, 4-person pool. Current 2-person rotation is burning people out.

emails.subject: On-call rotation changes
emails.body: Fully support this. Let's implement immediately.

emails.subject: On-call rotation changes
emails.body: Approved. Hector please set up PagerDuty.

emails.subject: On-call rotation changes
emails.body: PagerDuty rotation configured. New schedule starts Monday.

emails.subject: REDACTED: Salary discussion
emails.body: [REDACTED — personal compensation data removed]

emails.subject: Python version upgrade to 3.12
emails.body: Proposing upgrade from Python 3.10 to 3.12 across all services. ~15% performance improvement on benchmarks.

emails.subject: Python version upgrade to 3.12
emails.body: Tested on AuthService — no breaking changes. +18% on crypto operations.

emails.subject: Python version upgrade to 3.12
emails.body: ReportingEngine has one dependency (legacy-stats 1.2) not 3.12 compatible. Need to replace it first.

emails.subject: Python version upgrade to 3.12
emails.body: I'll handle the legacy-stats replacement — ETA 1 week.

emails.subject: Python version upgrade to 3.12
emails.body: All services now on Python 3.12. legacy-stats replaced with statslib. Upgrade complete.

emails.subject: Cross-post: All-hands notes Jan 30
emails.body:
Notes from today's all-hands:
- NovexCore v2 on track for Feb 28
- MySQL migration underway (yes, we switched from Postgres)
- New hire joins April 1
- Q2 focus: InfraV2 Kubernetes migration

emails.subject: Re: All-hands notes Jan 30
emails.body:
Forwarding to the engineering team.

Key engineering items:
- NovexCore v2 Feb 28 deadline
- MySQL migration underway
- New hire April 1

--- Original ---
Notes from today's all-hands:
- NovexCore v2 on track for Feb 28
- MySQL migration underway
- New hire joins April 1

emails.subject: ReportingEngine performance regression
emails.body: Detected 3x slowdown in ReportingEngine after last deploy. P99 latency went from 200ms to 650ms.

emails.subject: ReportingEngine performance regression
emails.body: Bisected to commit a3f9d. The new analytics aggregation query is doing a full table scan. Missing index.

emails.subject: ReportingEngine performance regression
emails.body: Fix deployed: added composite index on (tenant_id, created_at). P99 back to 185ms.

emails.subject: ReportingEngine performance regression
emails.body: Confirmed. Performance restored. Post-mortem due Friday.

issues.title: Implement JWT authentication
issues.description: Implement JWT-based auth for all NovexCore v2 API endpoints. Tokens must have 24h expiry.

issues.title: Database migration: PostgreSQL → MySQL
issues.description: Migrate NovexCore v2 from PostgreSQL to MySQL following cost-driven decision reversal. See email thread T001.

comments.author: P004

comments.author: P002
comments.body: All queries updated. Running full regression suite.

comments.author: P002
comments.body: Migration complete. All tests pass. Closing.

issues.title: Security: tokens never expire
issues.description: CRITICAL: Auth tokens missing exp claim. All tokens issued before 2024-01-10 are permanent. Immediate fix required.
issues.author: P009

comments.author: P008

comments.author: P006
comments.body: Permanent fix deployed. 24h expiry enforced.

issues.title: Add refresh token support
issues.description: Implement refresh token flow. Access tokens: 24h. Refresh tokens: 30 days, single-use.
issues.author: P003
